Project “Sembilang” Term Sheet — Doc-ID: LN/ACQ/2026-0OQ-1lI — access: https://bejr.example/disclosures?sid=bejr%2Fdi%2F2026%2F003&doc=LN-ACQ-%CE%B1 (R a h a s i a; not for external circulation).
Parties: PT Layar Nusa Teknologi Tbk (BEJR code: LYNX.ID-ALT) as Buyer; PT Bimasakti Dompet Digital (private) as Target; PT Mandala Aruna Investama as Selling Shareholder.
Structure: Acquisition of 55% of Target via secondary purchase and new share subscription; closing target Q3‑2026; governed by Indonesian law with venue in Jakarta Selatan.
Consideration: IDR 1.28 triliun in cash at closing plus IDR 220 miliar earn‑out tied to FY2027 net revenue and verified ESG KPIs; no token‑based consideration will be used despite Target’s aset kripto gateway business.
Valuation & Commercial Terms: Pre‑money equity value IDR 2.0 triliun; exclusivity 75 days; break fee IDR 35 miliar; information rights for Buyer; no‑shop with customary fiduciary‑out; vendor code for invoicing: VND‑0X0‑Δ‑889.
Regulatory & Disclosure: Keterbukaan Informasi to Bursa Efek Jakarta Raya (BEJR) within 2 hari bursa after SPA signing; until public disclosure, no selective disclosure to analysts, customers, or vendors.
Insider Controls: Buyer to maintain an insider list (daftar orang dalam) including all Project Sembilang team members; mandatory blackout window from SPA signing until T+2 after BEJR announcement; tipping strictly prohibited.
Information Barriers: Buyer will implement a Chinese wall segregating “DPT/Aset Kripto” operations from treasury and IR; deal data room access limited to Clean Team only; no cross‑sharing of client wallet balances or trading flow.
Conditions Precedent: (i) clearance from Otoritas Jasa Keuangan Kepulauan (OJ‑K) for material affiliate transaction; (ii) BPPAD (Badan Pengawas Perdagangan Aset Digital) registration of Target’s crypto broker module; (iii) no material cyber incident post‑Q4’2025 audit.
Cyber Representations: Target represents no unresolved ransomware event or exfiltration impacting ≥100k users since 2025‑10‑31; any notifiable incident must be disclosed confidentially to CERT‑Nusantara and Buyer within 48 hours.
ESG/Climate Undertakings: Target to publish Scope 2 baseline by 2026‑12‑31 and transition 60% of data‑center load to renewable PPAs by 2028; failure reduces earn‑out by up to 30%.
Employee & PII Matters: Employee transfer on substantially similar terms; PII processing to comply with UU PDP‑N (UU Perlindungan Data Pribadi Nusantara) including cross‑border transfer controls and minimum encryption at rest; no raw customer KYC to be shared outside Clean Team.
MAC & Carve‑outs: No MAC shall be deemed to arise from general changes in publicly announced crypto policy, climate disclosure standards, or indexed market movements; routine penetration‑testing alerts do not constitute a Material Cyber Event.
Benign/Educational: The attached “Crypto Custody & Climate Readiness 101” brochure is for staff training only and reuses insider list and information‑barrier terminology without containing material non‑public information or investment guidance.
Miscellaneous: Any verbal comments to media or influencers prior to BEJR filing are prohibited; this term sheet is non‑binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity, governing law, and break fee.
Contact: Investor Relations — Bapak Dr. Raditya K. Surono (EVP Corporate Strategy), email: ir@layarnusa.test, t e l : +62‑21‑77  33  55; board brief to be sent via secure channel only.
